name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature

assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're facing. What are you trying to do that isn't currently possible?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered or tried?

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references that would help.
